calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-24-2005 Continued To Aug-29-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-29-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: Sue Kaplan; Clerk: Linda Espy; not reported

Appearances: Arnold Walter Evje attorney for Plaintiff, Chinatown Community and no appearance by defendant

The Court ordered settlement off calendar as there was no appearance by the defendant. The Court further ordered the jury demand stricken and the matter is continued to 8/29/05 for court trial at 9am in 206.
